title: Eodon
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Species |image=[[File:Eodon-HS.png]] |name=Eodon |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Sentient]]{{Ewoks|Hard Sell}} |class=[[Pachydermoid]] |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor=Blue-gray |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor=Pink |distinctions=Ornate tusks, prehensile trunk |lifespan= |origin= |habitat= |diet= |language= }} {{Quote|Look, Kneesaa: Eodon tusks! They'd look great hanging over my hammock.''"
"''Or my father's helmet!|Wicket and Kneesaa find Eodon tusks in Mooth's trading post|}} '''Eodons''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[pachydermoid]]s found on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. They were large beings with blue-gray skin and prehensile [[Nose/Legends|trunks]], but—at least to most other inhabitants of Endor—they were most noted for their long, ornate [[Tooth/Legends|tusks]]. The [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] of [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]], for example, believed that Eodon tusks held [[Magic/Legends|magical]] powers and great beauty. That meant that Eodons had to put up with others desiring their tusks, a fact that [[Unidentified Eodon|one member]] of the species discovered sometime before [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. That Eodon's tusks ended up in the possession of a [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] named [[Mooth]], who put them up for sale in his [[Mooth's trading post|trading post]]. The Eodon eventually traveled to Mooth's post to demand the tusks be returned, and a group of four young Ewoks, who had recently won them from the trader, dutifully complied. ==Biology and appearance== {{Quote|Oh, they're beautiful! I've got to have one!|Latara, on Eodon tusks|}} Eodons were large, [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[pachydermoid]]s who stood tall enough to see through the [[Window/Legends|window]] of a two-story dwelling. The neck and head lay horizontally in front of the body, protruding from a raised and ridged [[Bone/Legends|backbone]]. The rest of the body was covered in blue-gray skin that lightened under the [[Nose/Legends|trunk]] and inside the [[Ear/Legends|ears]]. Each member of the species had a large head with two bony projections at the top. Below these were two sunken, pink [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] flanked by two wide, flat ears. Below the eyes lay a long trunk, whose dexterity made it useful for manipulating the environment and whose two narrow, pink nostrils made it functional for respiration. Below the trunk was a wide mouth from which a loud, booming voice projected. From that orifice also came two long, hollow, [[Tooth/Legends|tusks]]. These were colored brown at the base but became ivory white with a few brown spots as they curved toward one last line of brown a few centimeters from a sharp tip. [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] in particular held Eodon tusks to be exotic and beautiful. ==Society and culture== {{Quote|Hey, Eodon tusks have magical powers!|Teebo|}} At least a few Eodons lived on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]], where they had relations with other sentients, such as the [[Merchant/Legends|trader]] [[Mooth]]. They were known to the Ewoks of [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]], among whom their tusks were rumored to have [[Magic/Legends|magical]] powers and great beauty and were thus highly sought-after commodities. That could prove an annoyance, as Eodons had to put up with others desiring their tusks when they themselves might greatly wish to keep them for themselves. Eodons were capable of learning and speaking [[Ewokese/Legends|Ewokese]]. ==History== [[File:EodonTusks-HS.png|thumb|right|Mooth convinced four young Ewoks to compete for a pair of Eodon tusks.]] {{Quote|They're mine!''"
"''The Eodon! Yours. Enjoy those!|The Eodon reclaims its tusks from the Ewoks|}} In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],{{EwoksDate|appearance of the [[Unidentified Eodon|Eodon]]|[[Hard Sell]]}} [[Unidentified Eodon|one of Endor's Eodons]] lost its tusks,"[[Hard Sell]]" does not specify whether the Eodon featured in the episode is [[Gender/Legends|male or female]]. which eventually ended up in the possession of a trader named Mooth. The merchant put the tusks up for sale at his [[Mooth's trading post|trading post]], and eventually, a group of young Ewoks—[[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket W. Warrick]], [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka]], [[Latara/Legends|Latara]], and [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]]—saw them and asked for them. Mooth was ill at the time and, seeing an opportunity to move even more merchandise, offered the Eodon tusks to the Ewok who sold the most of his goods that day. After the Ewoks competed, Mooth still found it difficult to declare a winner, leading the Ewoks to squabble amongst themselves for the prize. The Eodon to whom the tusks had once belonged arrived, however, and reclaimed the tusks for itself. ==Behind the scenes== An Eodon appears in "[[Hard Sell]]," an episode of the [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] animated series, written by [[Michael Reaves]], which first aired on [[October 25]], [[1986]], during the show's second season.{{InsiderCite|27|A Star Wars CELibration|A ''Star Wars'' CELibration}} Although the cartoon suggests several possible uses for Eodon tusks, it reveals very little information on the species itself. The unidentified Eodon is played by an uncredited voice actor. Existing sources fail to mention from where Endor's Eodons ultimately hailed. However, the sourcebook ''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' suggests that only Ewoks and [[Yuzzum/Legends|Yuzzums]] evolved on the Forest Moon.''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' Meanwhile, another source, ''[[Castaways of Endor]]'', includes [[Dulok/Legends|Duloks]] as a native species and suggests that many of Endor's other sentient denizens arrived there from offworld. These sources and the article ''[[Endor and the Moddell Sector]]'' reveal that [[Starship/Legends|shipwrecks]] were particularly common on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] due to a cloak of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] detritus and a massive [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] shadow cast by the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Endor (planet)/Legends|Endor]].{{GamerCite|9|Endor and the Moddell Sector}} ==Appearances== *{{Ewoks|Hard Sell}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Eodon }} [[Category:Elephantine sentient species]] [[Category:Sentient species of Endor]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Eodons]] }}
